headline: The AI buildout is still intact — what to buy this week
summary: Patrick Moorhead says the AI buildout is still intact — and explains why now is the time to get in on the AI trade revealing the names he thinks are best positioned, including Dell, HP, Cisco, Qualcomm, Micron, and Intel.

headline: Is AT&T (T) Quietly Rewiring Its Revenue Mix With Connected Car And Fiber Bundles?
summary: In early June 2026, LiveOne announced an expanded collaboration with AT&T and Cisco to integrate personalized, bundled in-vehicle entertainment into select AT&T Connected Car-equipped vehicles, while AT&T also simplified its fiber home internet lineup to four speed tiers with bundled wireless savings and added features like free Internet Backup and All-Fi Pro on its top plan. AT&T’s recent moves, including a multibillion-dollar ESOP-related shelf registration and deeper partnerships in areas...
